headline: WEC Energy (WEC): The Best Utility Stock that Beat Earnings Estimates
summary: WEC Energy Group, Inc. (NYSE:WEC) is one of the 10 Best Utility Stocks that Beat Earnings Estimates. On May 6, 2026, Mizuho raised the firm’s price target on WEC Energy Group, Inc. (NYSE:WEC) to $124 from $121 while maintaining an Outperform rating on the shares. On May 5, 2026, WEC Energy Group, Inc. (NYSE:WEC) reported […]
